{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Diava
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Diava]] is a short-handled, red-wrapped [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Denner]] thought [[Diava]] had stopped listening to the [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Diava," he said, hefting the short-handled, red-wrapped sword in his right hand.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
